briefs.title: B.C. Reg. 275/2022 (OIC 680/2022) Enacted — Review Full Text to Assess Business Impact
briefs.summary: B.C. Reg. 275/2022, enacted via Order in Council 680/2022, was published in B.C. Gazette No. 23 on December 31. The specific subject matter and obligations are not detailed in the available text.
briefs.action_required: Review the full text of B.C. Reg. 275/2022 in the B.C. Gazette to determine if it applies to your business.
